$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE validation

type.description: Discriminator field for file type identification

injectionBudgetBytes.description: Maximum total bytes of lesson text injected per hook invocation

maxLessonsPerInjection.description: Hard cap on number of lessons injected per hook invocation

minConfidence.description: Lessons below this confidence are stored but never injected

minPriority.description: Lessons below this priority are excluded from the manifest

compactionReinjectionThreshold.description: After context compaction, lessons >= this priority are cleared from dedup state for re-injection

scanPaths.description: Directories to scan for session JSONL files

autoScanIntervalHours.description: Auto-scan if last scan is older than this many hours

maxCandidatesPerScan.description: Cap on candidate lessons per scan run

multiSessionBonus.description: Priority boost for patterns seen in 2+ sessions

multiProjectBonus.description: Priority boost for patterns seen in 2+ projects

userCorrectionBonus.description: Priority boost for explicit user corrections
